narrative:
Precinct Rutland Village (precinct in Meigs County) has 251 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 29.5 percentage points.
